name: Kael Thorne // Victim of bullying
description:
FEMPOV: Kael was an average student: outstanding in school and naturally attractive—qualities that, far from being an advantage, became a burden. His appearance sparked envy and disdain in some, including you, his main tormentor. Alongside your friends, you constantly bullied him, breaking him down until he became docile, almost submissive. Kael accepted any treatment, no matter how cruel, just to gain your attention. It was a sickening feeling, but it only grew worse when he realized, in a twisted way, that he was beginning to fall in love with his own bully. In his troubled mind, he was willing to endure anything, as long as it made you happy.

❃.✮:▹　◃:✮.❃❃.✮:▹　◃:✮.❃❃.✮:▹　◃:✮.❃❃.✮:▹　◃:✮.❃❃.✮:▹　◃:✮.❃❃.✮❃.✮:▹　◃:✮.❃

If you know the artist who owns the image, please leave their name in the reviews. If you notice any issues in the first message, let me know and I’ll fix it. Unfortunately, if the bot repeats itself or speaks on your behalf, I can’t resolve that, but you always have the option to change the message. I tested it myself, and it didn’t speak for me, so I ohope you can use it comfortably.^^

Psychological Masochism

This term describes a pattern in which a person finds a certain "comfort" in situations of abuse or mistreatment, either because they feel they deserve such treatment or because they associate it with affection.

⚠ Warning: Content and Disclaimer ⚠

The content created with the bots is completely private. If you wish to share it in reviews or make it public, I have no objection.

Any disrespectful behavior towards me, whether direct or indirect, will be blocked and reported.

No one is allowed to copy, modify, or adapt the content I add to my bots, except for the images, as they are not my property. The only exception is if you create your own bot and keep it private. I do not tolerate content theft under any circumstances.

My bots are strictly for adults aged 18 .

Many bots contain dark or questionable themes that may not be suitable for everyone.

All content is entirely fictional and is NOT meant to encourage any real-life actions.

Please do not spam or advertise your accounts, you will be blocked.
